headline: The $13 Billion World Cup: Inside FIFA’s Massive Moneymaking Play
summary: The 2026 World Cup, to be played in North America, has been called the equivalent of 104 Super Bowls in a month. Who stands to gain—and what it will cost fans.

headline: Is McDonald’s Corp (MCD) One of the Best Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Bill Gates?
summary: McDonald’s Corp (NYSE:MCD) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Bill Gates. Analysts see more than 20% upside potential on MCD stock from the current level.
